title: z3.solve.params
description: Parameters for the z3.solve MCP method. Run an SMT-LIB v2 query using Z3 (via z3-solver).

smt2.description: SMT-LIB v2 input string to be checked.

timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for this operation (optional; server enforces global caps).

produce_model.description: Request model production if the solver supports it.

logic.description: Optional logic string for the solver (e.g., QF_LIA).

random_seed.description: Optional random seed for solver heuristics.
